question: Will the highest temperature in New York City be between 48-49°F on November 15?
event_title: Highest temperature in NYC on November 15?

evidences.title: LaGuardia Airport Weather Records
evidences.content: Extreme Weather Watch # LaGuardia Airport Weather Records LaGuardia Airport, New York weather averages and records from 1939–2026 based on data made available by the NOAA. All-Time Recorded High The highest temperature ever recorded in LaGuardia Airport, New York was 107 °F which occurred on July 3, 1966. Highest Temperatures: All-Time By Year All-Time Recorded Low The lowest temperature ever recorded in LaGuardia Airport, New York was -7 °F which occurred on February 15, 1943. evidences.title: La Guardia Airport, NY Historical Data - National Weather Service
evidences.content: Daily, Monthly, Seasonal and Annual Climate Reports The Daily Climate Report (CLI) is produced twice a day, at around 4:30 pm and 1:30 am. The 4:30 PM report contains data from 12:00 am EST (1:00 am EDT) to 4:00 PM local time and is referred to as "preliminary" data. The 1:30 am "daily" report contains 24 hours of data starting at 12:00 am EST (1:00 am EDT) the previous day. Monthly reports are produced after each month has completed. Seasonal reports cover a three month period: Dec-Feb for Winter, Mar-May for Spring, Jun-Aug for Summer, and Sep-Nov for Fall. | | | | | --- --- | | Daily | Monthly | Seasonal | Annual | Top of Page | Home Page [...] National Weather Service United States Department of Commerce NWS All NOAA Privacy Policy New York, NY Weather Forecast Office # La Guardia Airport, NY Historical Data Location History Observation Site: LaGuardia Airport Official Records: October 7, 1939 to Present Monthly Almanacs Daily climatological data can be analyzed to produce averages and records. This information is included in our monthly almanacs. The almanacs also contain times of sunrise and sunset and daily records of precipitation and snowfall. | | | | | | | --- --- ---...
